title: Claude Code just Changed Website Design Forever
summary: Jack Roberts demonstrates Claude Code, an AI-powered system for building responsive client websites with an integrated CMS that allows clients to edit content without technical knowledge. The workflow combines Claude's code generation, design extraction tools, and MongoDB for backend management, deployed via Vercel.
